name: acp-gateway
description: SSE+POST gateway fronting one or more ACP agents for remote mobile control over a VPN

scripts.build: npm --prefix web ci && npm --prefix web run build && esbuild src/gateway.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node22 --external:node-pty --outfile=dist/gateway.js && esbuild src/md.ts --bundle --format=iife --target=es2018 --outfile=public/vendor/md.js --minify
scripts.test: ACPG_NO_LISTEN=1 ACPG_AUTH_USER=test-user ACPG_AUTH_TOKEN=test-token node --import tsx --test src/*.test.ts
